hero.title: Your store management,
hero.subtitle: The first Business Operating System built for furniture and bedding stores. Invoices, inventory, GPS deliveries, after-sales and AI — all in one.

pain.title: Running a store shouldn't look like this.
pain.subtitle: Outdated tools, scattered data, zero AI. NeoFlow BOS changes everything.

items.title: Software that never evolves
items.desc: The legacy solutions of the sector were designed 15 years ago. No AI, no automation, frozen interface.

items.title: Zero intelligence in your tools
items.desc: You have to analyze everything manually. Competitors using AI make better decisions, faster.

items.title: 5 tools to do the work of one
items.desc: POS software, stock spreadsheet, delivery app, CRM, after-sales tool — each separate, nothing synchronized.

solution.title: Everything your store needs.
solution.desc: NeoFlow BOS centralizes your entire commercial activity — from orders to delivery, from quotes to invoices, from support tickets to credit notes — with an AI that knows your business.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.desc: In 2 minutes, your space is ready. No installation, no complex setup — everything runs in the browser.

steps.title: Configure your store
steps.desc: Add your products, stock locations and team members. NeoFlow BOS adapts to your store's structure.

steps.title: Sell and invoice
steps.desc: Create quotes, orders and professional invoices in a few clicks. Automatic PDF, email delivery, payment tracking.

steps.title: Deliver with GPS
steps.desc: Plan and assign deliveries. Your drivers have their own mobile app with GPS navigation and delivery confirmation.

steps.title: Pilot with AI
steps.desc: NeoChat knows your business. Ask questions in plain language, get instant insights and generate documents.

items.title: NeoChat — Agentic AI
items.desc: Not a chatbot. An AI agent that acts: searches your orders, creates deliveries, updates statuses — always asking for your confirmation before touching any data.

items.title: Quote → Invoice Pipeline
items.desc: Quotes, orders and invoices are automatically linked. Convert a quote to an order in one click. PDF generated, email sent, payment tracked.

items.title: Stock by Location
items.desc: Stock levels per physical location (warehouse, showroom, depot). Configurable threshold alerts. Full movement history.

items.title: Deliveries & Driver App
items.desc: Delivery kanban, configurable customer time slots. Drivers get their own mobile app with GPS — without access to the rest of your workspace.

items.title: After-Sales & Auto Credits
items.desc: Structured SAV tickets per order item. Tracked interventions, full customer history. One-click credit note generation directly from the ticket.

items.title: Workspace & Roles
items.desc: Isolated space per store. 4 roles: Owner, Manager, Salesperson, Driver — each sees only what they need. Secure invitations via unique link.

neochat.title: The AI that
neochat.desc: NeoChat knows your inventory, orders and customers. But what sets it apart: it can act. Create a delivery, update an order — and always asks for your confirmation before touching your data.

demo.text: Which orders have been pending for more than 3 days?
3 blocked orders: ORD-0287 (Mr. Smith, £1,890), ORD-0283 (Renov Ltd, £8,750), ORD-0279 (Mrs. Martin, £3,240). Shall I schedule the deliveries?

plans.name: Basic
plans.desc: To get started and manage your store daily.

plans.name: Pro
plans.desc: For growing teams with advanced needs.

items.a: NeoFlow BOS is a SaaS Business Operating System designed specifically for furniture and bedding stores. It centralizes complete commercial management: invoices, quotes, orders, inventory, deliveries, after-sales and AI in a single tool.

items.q: What type of store is NeoFlow BOS designed for?
items.a: NeoFlow BOS is designed for furniture and bedding stores, whether independent or part of a network. It targets SMBs with 1 to several dozen employees, in France and in French and English-speaking countries.
No commitment whatsoever. You can cancel at any time from your account. The annual subscription offers 2 months free compared to monthly, but can still be cancelled.

NeoChat is the AI assistant integrated into NeoFlow BOS. Unlike a generic chatbot, it has access to your business data (inventory, customers, invoices, orders) and can answer specific questions about your activity or generate documents.
Yes, with the Enterprise plan you can manage multiple stores from a centralized dashboard with a single subscription. Basic and Pro plans manage one store at a time.

items.q: How does the free trial work?
items.a: You get a 7-day free trial on the plan of your choice. You have access to all features of the selected plan. The trial starts as soon as you create your account.
NeoFlow BOS is mobile-optimized via the browser. Additionally, drivers have a dedicated simplified interface (Pro and Enterprise plans) optimized for field use with GPS.
Support is available by email and integrated chat for all plans. Enterprise customers benefit from a dedicated contact with guaranteed SLA. You can also use the contact form on our website.

finalCta.title: Modernize the management
finalCta.desc: Join the first stores to use NeoFlow BOS. 7 days free, no commitment, cancel anytime.
finalCta.mention: No credit card required during trial

footer.tagline: The Business Operating System for furniture and bedding stores.

enterprise.title: NeoFlow BOS for
enterprise.desc: A centralized space to manage multiple stores. Each location keeps its autonomy — you keep the global picture.

features.title: One workspace per store
features.desc: Each store has its own isolated space: data, team, stock. No information leak between locations.

features.title: Group dashboard
features.desc: View revenue, orders and stock alerts across all your stores from a single view. (Rolling out soon)

features.title: Unlimited members
features.desc: Invite as many collaborators as needed to each workspace. No per-seat surcharge.

features.title: Unlimited NeoChat AI
features.desc: Unlimited tokens across all your workspaces. Agentic AI available for your entire team, no counter.

features.title: Dedicated support & SLA
features.desc: A direct contact at NeoFlow. Guaranteed response time, priority availability 7 days a week.

features.title: Guided onboarding
features.desc: We configure NeoFlow BOS with you and train your teams. No blind start.
